title: Text-to-CAD
description: Natural-language part description → validated, STEP-first parametric CAD model (build123d / OpenCascade) via the earthtojake/text-to-cad cad skill. Authors a parametric build123d generator, exports STEP + STL/GLB sidecars, inspects geometry against the spec, and renders a verification snapshot.

example_outputs.title: Bolt-Circle Mounting Flange

values.prompt: A round mounting flange: 60 mm outer diameter, 8 mm thick, with a 25 mm diameter central bore and six 5.5 mm bolt holes evenly spaced on a 46 mm bolt circle.

example_outputs.excerpt: 1 solid, 17552 mm³; outer diameter 60 mm, thickness 8 mm — all spec dims verified.

example_outputs.title: Hex Standoff with Axial Bore

values.prompt: A hexagonal standoff 20 mm tall with a 12 mm across-flats hex body and a concentric 4.2 mm through-hole along its central axis.

example_outputs.excerpt: 1 solid, 2217 mm³; height 20 mm, across-flats 12 mm, bore 4.2 mm — all spec dims verified.

example_outputs.title: Mounting Bracket with Fillets

values.prompt: A 40 x 40 x 10 mm aluminum mounting bracket. Add four M4 clearance holes (4.5 mm diameter) positioned 8 mm in from each corner, and a 3 mm fillet on the four vertical outer edges.

example_outputs.excerpt: 1 solid, 15287 mm³; 40×40×10 mm, four 4.5 mm holes at 8 mm inset, 3 mm fillets — all spec dims verified.

inputs.label: Prompt
inputs.description: Natural-language CAD spec (dimensions, features, intent). Example: 'a 40x40x10mm mounting bracket with four M4 clearance holes 8mm from each corner and a 3mm fillet on the vertical outer edges'.
